text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to understand and interpret visual information from the world. One of its core functions is image recognition, where a system identifies objects, people, or scenes in photos. A more advanced task is object detection, which not only identifies objects but also locates them within an image. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, in self-driving cars, computer vision systems detect pedestrians, traffic signs, and other vehicles to navigate safely. It is also used in medical imaging to find diseases, in security cameras to recognize faces, and in smartphones to organize photo albums automatically.
